mxlibrary: [{"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 106, "title": "mux2", "tags": "mux2 mux clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 106, "title": "mux3", "tags": "mux3 mux clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 122, "title": "mux4", "tags": "mux4 mux clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 142, "title": "mux5", "tags": "mux5 mux clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 162, "title": "mux6", "tags": "mux6 mux clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "gate", "tags": "gate clock gating drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "div", "tags": "div divider clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "cell", "tags": "cell clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "dto", "tags": "dto duty clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "inv", "tags": "inv inverter clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "pll", "tags": "pll clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "pll2", "tags": "pll2 pll clock drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 90, "title": "source", "tags": "source clock oscillator xtal drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 260, "h": 72, "title": "clock", "tags": "clock terminal sink drawclock"}, {"xml": "", "w": 120, "h": 40, "title": "wire", "tags": "wire connect line drawclock"}]
